sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐπίσημος

- Transliteration: Episemos

- Phonetic: ep-is'-ay-mos

- Definition:

1. having a mark on it, marked, stamped, coined

2. marked

a. in a good sense

1. of note, illustrious

b. in a bad sense

1. notorious, infamous

- Origin: from G1909 and some form of the base of G4591

- TDNT entry: 11:27,1

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From G1909 and some form of the base of G4591; remarkable that is (figuratively) eminent: - notable of note.
